name: Telegram Signal Tollbooth
description: Paid Telegram signal agent where a user requests a signal, pays through DNA x402, verifies receipt, and gets the signal.
degenPitch: Turn Telegram alpha into a tollbooth with receipts instead of trust-me-bro screenshots.
whatItDoes: Quotes paid signal access from a bot command.
Verifies receipt before sending the premium signal.
Keeps bot tokens and wallet keys out of the public repo.
cursorPrompt: Build a Telegram Signal Tollbooth using DNA x402. User requests a signal, bot shows quote, payment proof is finalized, receipt is verified, and the bot unlocks the signal. The bot must not hold keys.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Telegram Signal Tollbooth using DNA x402. User requests a signal, bot shows quote, payment proof is finalized, receipt is verified, and the bot unlocks the signal. The bot must not hold keys.
